english_summary: This is a procurement tender for a comprehensive range of orthopaedic implants, devices, and materials issued by the Orthopaedic Clinic in Lovran, Croatia. The tender covers approximately 70+ different categories of orthopaedic products including hip and knee endoprostheses, spinal fixation systems, arthroscopic equipment, bone cements, and various surgical implants.
what_they_want: Primary hip endoprosthesis systems (cemented and cementless), knee endoprostheses (total and partial, cemented and cementless), shoulder prosthesis systems, spinal transpedicular fixation systems, meniscus suturing systems, RF electrodes for arthroscopy, bone-ligament fixation implants, cervical spine implantation materials, knee arthroscopy implants, bone cement and polyethylene acetabular inserts, external fixators consumables, wrist arthrodesis locking plates, hand and wrist anchors, proximal interphalangeal joint implants, bone substitutes, vertebroplasty and discectomy sets, acromioclavicular joint stabilization implants, rotator cuff reconstruction implants, femoral nails, ligament reconstruction implants, synthetic bone graft replacements, cannulated screws, intramedullary nails, bioabsorbable fixation nails, dual mobility acetabulum systems, reverse shoulder prostheses, antibiotic-resorptive carriers, drills and saws, and other osteosynthesis materials.
